description: Complete power delivery chain from USB-C input to SoC power pins. 7 sequential stages. NO MAGSAFE on this model — USB-C only.

stages.name: USB-C Input & Initial 5V
stages.description: USB-C cable supplies 5V default. CD3217B12KE port controllers manage CC signaling and VBUS switching. Two USB-C ports — left rear (debug) and left front.

stages.name: PD Negotiation & 20V Boost
stages.description: CD3217 negotiates USB PD to request 20V from charger adapter. Fused through FF200/FF201.

stages.name: Charger → PPBUS_AON
stages.description: U5200 (Suona B379, 63W, 353S01525) charger IC converts USB-C input to PPBUS_AON. Battery also connects via J5150 solder pads.

stages.name: SVR AON → PP3V8_AON
stages.description: U5700 multi-phase buck converts PPBUS_AON to 3.8V always-on rail. 30A ICC MAX. Master rail feeding both PMUs and external LDOs.

stages.name: PMU Distribution
stages.description: PP3V8_AON feeds both SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100). Each PMU generates multiple buck and LDO outputs for S2, S1, and AWAKE domains.

stages.name: External LDOs & Standalone VRs
stages.description: UC100 and UC120 produce AON LDO rails from PP3V8_AON. UC300 and UC710 produce 5V and 3.3V from PPBUS_AON. Load switches gate subsystems.

stages.name: SoC Power Domains
stages.description: Final rails reaching SoC U0600 pin groups. M1 SoC (TML R6A0-B09).
